title: galium gracile var. parisiense
intro: Galium gracile var. parisiense, also known as Paris Milkwort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galium gracile var. parisiense include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma, and promote the relief of menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate digestive discomfort.
